prompt: A gritty, cinematic boxing promotional poster featuring a face-to-face staredown between {argument name="fighter 1" default="Mike Tyson"} on the left and {argument name="fighter 2" default="Sam Altman"} on the right. The left fighter is an older, bald man with a tribal facial tattoo, wearing a black boxing glove with "TYSON" printed on it. The right fighter is a younger man with dark wavy hair, wearing a black boxing glove featuring the OpenAI logo and text. Both men have intense, serious expressions, with highly detailed skin textures and sweat. The background is an out-of-focus boxing ring under bright stadium lights. The poster has a vintage, slightly scratched grunge texture. At the top, text reads "WORLD TECH vs BOXING CHAMPIONSHIP" in white and "{argument name="top tagline" default="NO CODE. ALL CHAOS."}" in red. In the center, large bold typography reads "MIKE TYSON" in red, "★ VS ★" in red, and "SAM ALTMAN" in large cream-white letters. Below this, text reads "{argument name="middle tagline" default="THE BRAWN. THE BRAIN. THE FUTURE."}". At the bottom, 3 columns of text display "{argument name="event date" default="SAT JULY 26"}", "LIVE ON PAY-PER-VIEW" in red, and "AT&T STADIUM ARLINGTON, TX". The very bottom footer reads "PRESENTED BY NETFLIX | TESLA | OPENAI".
translatedPrompt: 一张充满颗粒感、电影质感的拳击宣传海报，展示了左侧的 {argument name="fighter 1" default="Mike Tyson"} 与右侧的 {argument name="fighter 2" default="Sam Altman"} 面对面较量的场景。左侧拳手是一位年长的光头男子，面部带有部落纹身，戴着印有 "TYSON" 字样的黑色拳击手套。右侧拳手是一位年轻男子，留着深色波浪卷发，戴着印有 OpenAI 标志和文字的黑色拳击手套。两人表情严肃且充满张力，皮肤纹理和汗水细节极其逼真。背景是明亮体育场灯光下虚化的拳击台。海报带有复古且略显磨损的垃圾摇滚质感。顶部文字为白色的 "WORLD TECH vs BOXING CHAMPIONSHIP" 以及红色的 "{argument name="top tagline" default="NO CODE. ALL CHAOS."}"。海报中央以醒目的粗体排版显示红色的 "MIKE TYSON"、红色的 "★ VS ★" 以及巨大的乳白色 "SAM ALTMAN" 字样。下方文字为 "{argument name="middle tagline" default="THE BRAWN. THE BRAIN. THE FUTURE."}"。底部通过 3 列文字展示 "{argument name="event date" default="SAT JULY 26"}"、红色的 "LIVE ON PAY-PER-VIEW" 以及 "AT&T STADIUM ARLINGTON, TX"。最底部的页脚文字为 "PRESENTED BY NETFLIX | TESLA | OPENAI"。

breakdown.creativeCore: 电影质感拳击比赛海报：生成一张充满颗粒感、高对比度的虚构拳击比赛宣传海报，支持自定义拳手、标语及赛事详情。
breakdown.subject: 文字符号
breakdown.bestUse: 品牌字标、标题字、活动视觉、字体风格探索

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 字体/Logo image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
